TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Qowgan, title = Qowgan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Qowgan} }

S.FORM: alang Qowgan ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Syurin go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 449 buwan, 1,385 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 93% kyan ku 1,284 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 7% kyan ku 101 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Truku 76%, Amis 6%, Tayan 4%, Setik 1%, Bunun 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 6%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Qowgan hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Qowgan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Qowgan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkraya' na Qowgan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkraya' na Qowgan hya' ga Pratan. tay mkyahu' na Qowgan hya' ga Kdusan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Qowgan ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Syurin go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 449 buwan, 1,385 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 93% kyan ku 1,284 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 7% kyan ku 101 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Truku 76%, Amis 6%, Tayan 4%, Setik 1%, Bunun 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 6%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Qowgan hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Qowgan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Qowgan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkraya' na Qowgan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkraya' na Qowgan hya' ga Pratan. tay mkyahu' na Qowgan hya' ga Kdusan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ qowɣan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu s~ɕjurin ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, truku **%, amis~ɕ *%, tajan *%, s~ɕetik *%, βunun *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na qowɣan ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na qowɣan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na qowɣan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkrajaʔ na qowɣan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkrajaʔ na qowɣan ħjaʔ ɣa pratan. taj mkjaħuʔ na qowɣan ħjaʔ ɣa k*us~ɕan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
